result.reason: Implement the ability to merge configuration files from different sources and automatically export current settings to enhance user configuration management.
result.approach: Investigate existing configuration loading and saving mechanisms. Design and implement a merging strategy for different configuration file types. Implement an auto-export feature that triggers on significant configuration changes or application exit.
